name: provar-demo-pipeline
description: Remotion compositor pipeline: raw Playwright recordings + timeline JSON → polished demo GIFs/MP4s

scripts.render: npx remotion render src/Root.tsx DemoComposition out/demo.mp4
scripts.render:gif: npx remotion render src/Root.tsx DemoComposition out/demo.mp4 && ffmpeg -i out/demo.mp4 -vf "fps=15,scale=1200:-1" -loop 0 out/demo.gif
